2320770.name: Pinewood Valley
2320770.description:
Pinewood Valley thrusts you into a spine-tingling, single-player horror experience. It is 2006, and you return to your hometown as a young man, only to find it shrouded in secrets and haunted by a sinister presence. Every shadow hides a new danger, and survival means outsmarting, escaping, and confronting a ruthless group of killers to save the town you once called home.

Open World: Step into a richly detailed open world where nearly every building invites exploration. Lose yourself for hours as you roam the Town, uncovering secrets and confronting both new and familiar dangers.

Encounter Survivors: You are not the only one trying to survive in the Town, meet and interact with survivors along the way who are trying to survive the night and make it out alive.

Killer Line-up: Face a chilling array of killers, each with their own twisted style, yet all united by a relentless urge to hunt you and the entire Town.

Run, hide, or fight: The choice is yours. Sprinting offers the safest escape from relentless killers, while hiding gives you a lifeline in cramped spaces. In Pinewood Valley, you are never without options. Some enemies are fierce and hard to defeat, but every threat can be overcome.

Weapons: Arm yourself with an array of powerful firearms to stand your ground against relentless killers.
2320770.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
